family_context.preferred_cover_geography: Georgia and Germany, ideally worldwide excluding the US

normalization_contract.record_granularity: one normalized insurer/plan discovery item per stable candidate_id
normalization_contract.traceability_requirement: Every normalized record keeps all raw mention_ids and all supporting source references needed to reopen the upstream evidence trail.
normalization_contract.discovery_only_note: This artifact normalizes discovery candidates and preserves evidence provenance; it does not rank or recommend plans.

resolution_summary.duplicate_resolution_rule: Mentions sharing the same candidate_id were collapsed into one normalized discovery item while preserving every mention and every upstream dataset/source reference in traceability arrays.

duplicate_resolution.duplicate_resolution_note: Only one raw mention existed for this normalized candidate in the current discovery capture.

mention_traceability.source_title: Securus - Global Health Cover
